title: ProvisionedConcurrencyConfig
description: Provisioned concurrency configuration for a function

RequestedProvisionedConcurrentExecutions.description: The amount of provisioned concurrency requested

AvailableProvisionedConcurrentExecutions.description: The amount of provisioned concurrency available

AllocatedProvisionedConcurrentExecutions.description: The amount of provisioned concurrency allocated

StatusReason.description: For failed allocations, the reason the status is FAILED

LastModified.description: The date and time the configuration was last modified
